Transfer Acceleration is designed to optimize transfer speeds from across the world into S3 general purpose buckets. Transfer Acceleration takes advantage of the globally distributed edge locations in Amazon CloudFront. As the data arrives at an edge location, the data is routed to Amazon S3 over an optimized network path.
